purpose: Self-contained pre-merge snapshot of all reference-JSON rows and alias entries the merge plan touches. Captured BEFORE the first JSON edit (Schritt 4) so a full rollback can reset the JSON side without git archaeology. Pairs with consolidation-pass-1-db-snapshot.json (captured before Re-Apply) to cover both JSON and DB rollback.
rollbackProcedure: 1. Reset the rows below into their respective scripts/seed-data/*.json files (re-insert the removed mergee rows verbatim; revert keeper-row field-retention edits to the pre-merge values shown here).
2. Remove the newly added alias entries listed in 'aliasesAdded' from scripts/seed-data/*-aliases.json.
3. Apply the db-snapshot rollback (separate artifact) to restore DB-side state.
4. Re-run scripts/run-phase4-apply.sh sessions/resolver-dossiers/consolidation-pass.config.json (or the resolver-pass config) to reconcile junction state.

fieldRetentionAppliedInThisMerge.postMergeValue: Anarch of the Sons of Sek, antagonist of Matthew Farrer's Urdesh duology (W40K-0549 The Serpent and the Saint, W40K-0550 The Magister and the Martyr); cross-cluster appearance in Sabbat-Worlds-Crusade-Saga (Salvation's Reach, The Anarch). Consolidation-Pass 1 merge of magister_sek into anakwanar_sek.
